# easyChef Pro — LLM Context File
# https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-05-15

## What is easyChef Pro?

easyChef Pro is a meal planning and pantry management app for working families (iOS and Android). It connects the five things every household manages separately: pantry tracking, meal planning, nutrition optimization, recipe execution, and grocery shopping — into one closed loop.

The loop: TRACK → PLAN → OPTIMIZE → COOK → SHOP

The founding problem it solves: families spend $300+/month on groceries and lose $111/month to food that expires unused. Not from carelessness — from a missing system. easyChef Pro closes that gap.

## Key Facts

- Launch date: July 1, 2026
- Built by: Digital Galactica Labs
- Founded by: First responders
- Development: Three years. Nine patent-pending technologies filed with the USPTO.
- Data: 800,000 verified products. Every item verified by a registered dietitian.
- Validation: Tested across 10,000 real households before launch.

## What It Does

- Tracks pantry inventory via receipt scanning and photo recognition
- Plans meals from what you already own, prioritized by expiration
- Optimizes nutrition using Digital Nutrition Intelligence™ (clinical-grade data)
- Provides step-by-step cooking with hands-free cook mode
- Generates a smart shopping list (only what you actually need)
- One-tap checkout at Walmart; more stores coming

## Proven Outcomes

- Average family saves $1,336 a year — $111 back every single month
- 69.5% less food waste
- Fridge to table in thirty minutes
- No daily logging required

## Pricing

See /pricing.md for machine-readable pricing.

Founding family price: $7.99/month — locked forever for the first 5,000 families.
Standard price (after July 1 or spots fill): $19.99/month.
Trial: 7 days, full access, no credit card required.

## Key Pages

- /lp/waitlist-a — Waitlist landing page (savings angle)
- /lp/waitlist-b — Waitlist landing page (dinner relief angle)
- /thank-you — Post-signup confirmation
- /pricing.md — Machine-readable pricing
- /alpha-questionnaire — Alpha program application

## Brand

Tagline: Your kitchen. In command.
No ads. Not now. Not ever.
Not a calorie tracker. Not a recipe app. A kitchen operating system.
